price_sensitivity.description: More price-sensitive, tends to choose cost-effective options

satisfaction_level.description: Moderate satisfaction, with basic service requirements

amenities_importance.description: Values supporting facilities, but not the primary consideration

consumption_patterns.spending_behavior: Low to moderate frequency consumption, pursuing quality experience

venue_preferences.preference_description: Prefers public venues, focuses on convenience and cost-effectiveness

persona_summary: This user group is relatively mature in age, with a balanced gender distribution. They have low consumption frequency, but high expectations for each visit. Although their current satisfaction is not high, they value supporting facilities and professional services, preferring membership golf courses and other premium venues. They are typical low-frequency premium consumers who require service quality improvements to meet their stringent requirements.
